evals.prompt: validate the Dockerfile at skills/hadolint/evals/Dockerfile.test using the hadolint skill
evals.expected_output: Report showing Dockerfile validation errors with DL/SC rule codes and fixes
expectations: Output references running hadolint or Dockerfile validation
Output identifies specific errors like DL3006, DL3008, DL3009, or similar DL codes
Output suggests concrete fixes for each error found

evals.prompt: validate all Dockerfiles in this repository using the hadolint skill
evals.expected_output: Validation report covering all Dockerfiles found in the repository
expectations: Output references hadolint or Dockerfile validation
Output scans for Dockerfiles across the repository
Output reports validation results (pass or fail with details)

evals.prompt: check my Dockerfile for package pinning and image tagging issues using the hadolint skill
evals.expected_output: Focused validation identifying image tag and package version pinning issues
expectations: Output references DL3006 (image tagging) or DL3008 (package pinning) or similar
Output identifies untagged base images or unpinned package versions
Output provides fix guidance with specific version examples
